description: Maeneo ya kujifunza Kiswahili Darasa la 1 kwa kusikiliza, kuzungumza, kusoma, na kuandika.

learningAreas.title: Kusikiliza na Kuzungumza
learningAreas.description: Sikiliza kwa makini na ujibu maswali mepesi kwa Kiswahili.

learningAreas.title: Kusoma
learningAreas.description: Tambua sauti, herufi, maneno, na sentensi fupi.

learningAreas.title: Kuandika
learningAreas.description: Andika herufi, maneno, na sentensi fupi kwa usahihi.

learningAreas.title: Msamiati
learningAreas.description: Jifunze maneno mapya yanayotumika nyumbani na shuleni.
